title: Coefficients
learningOutcomes: Identify the coefficient in a term.

objectives.text: Identify the coefficient in each term of an expression.

theory: A coefficient is the numerical part of a term. In 5x, the coefficient is 5. In -3x², the coefficient is -3. Coefficients tell us how many times the variable is counted.
hints: Look at the number directly before the variable letter.
keyConcepts: Coefficient is the numerical multiplier of a variable.
Can be positive, negative, or fractional.
